question: An unmanned aircraft (UA) is required to have:

options.text: A registration label permanently affixed to the aircraft, and in the event of total destruction, notify CAAS within a month.
A registration label permanently affixed to the aircraft, with a unique identification number visible.
A registration label to be permanently affixed under the propeller blade of the first motor.
A registration label to be permanently affixed at a position where it can be visible from the ground while operating.
